archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for dark mode

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-bold font-['Cabinet_Grotesk']
scales.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl tracking-tight leading-none font-bold font-['Cabinet_Grotesk']
scales.h3: text-xl sm:text-2xl tracking-tight leading-snug font-semibold font-['Cabinet_Grotesk']
scales.h4: text-lg sm:text-xl tracking-tight leading-snug font-medium font-['Cabinet_Grotesk']
scales.label: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-['IBM_Plex_Sans']

layout.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Tailwind standard with p-6 to p-8 preferred for internal container paddings.
layout.surface_styles: Cardless look with subtle roundness max 8px (rounded-lg). Flat backgrounds, 1px subtle border, no shadow.

cards.wrapper: bg-[#121212] border border-[#27272A] rounded-lg p-6 flex flex-col h-full

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black font-semibold rounded-md px-4 py-2 hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-[#0A0A0A] focus:ring-white
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#27272A] text-white rounded-md px-4 py-2 hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] transition-colors
buttons.danger: bg-[#EF4444] text-white font-semibold rounded-md px-4 py-2 hover:bg-[#DC2626] transition-colors
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-[#A1A1AA] rounded-md px-3 py-1.5 hover:text-white hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] transition-colors

inputs.style: w-full bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-[#27272A] text-white rounded-md px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white focus:border-white transition-all placeholder-[#52525B]

tables.header: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#A1A1AA] border-b border-[#27272A] pb-3 font-semibold

charts.style_instructions: Use #FFFFFF for overall balance lines, #10B981 for income bars, #EF4444 for expense bars. Remove default grid lines or use very subtle #27272A dashed lines. Build custom tooltips that match the card style (bg-[#121212] border border-[#27272A] text-white).

badges.income: bg-[#10B981]/10 text-[#10B981] border border-[#10B981]/20 rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium
badges.expense: bg-[#EF4444]/10 text-[#EF4444] border border-[#EF4444]/20 rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium

icons_and_assets.icon_style: Regular weight, sized to match adjoining text. Use duotone only for empty states or decorative backgrounds.

images.description: Close-up portrait of a serious businessman against dark background.

specific_instructions: Strict .js usage: All frontend files must be written in Javascript (.jsx extension for React components). No Typescript.
Data Persistence: Use localStorage hook or context to save and load transactions, enabling persistent state across reloads.
Role-Based UI: Create a global toggle (header/nav) to switch between 'Viewer' and 'Admin'. In 'Viewer' mode, hide the 'Add Transaction', 'Edit', and 'Delete' controls entirely.
Dashboard Overview: The grid layout must allocate `col-span-1` for summary metric cards, `col-span-2` or `col-span-3` for the balance trend chart, and `col-span-1` for the spending breakdown chart.
Insights Section: Analyze the transactions array to calculate and display the highest spending category and month-over-month trend. Present these in a dedicated, prominent widget.
Transactions List: Must include search input, category filter dropdown, and sortable headers. Handle empty states gracefully with an illustrative Phosphor icon and clear prompt.
Forms & Modals: Use Shadcn UI Dialog/Modal logic, heavily customized to match the Swiss Dark Theme (sharp edges, pure dark surfaces, white focus rings).
Export Functionality: Add a simple utility to export current filtered transactions to a CSV file.
Testing: Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements and key widgets (e.g., data-testid='transaction-item', data-testid='role-toggle').
